message.content:
@startuml
actor Alice
participant Bob
box "System" #LightBlue
  participant User
end box

== Authentication ==
Alice ->> Bob : Authentication Request\nBob --> Alice : Authentication Response
note right of Bob: This note has bold **text**.
alt Successful case
    Alice ->> Bob : Another authentication Request
    alt checking credentials
        Bob -->> Alice : another authentication Response
    end
else Some kind of failure
    loop Infinite doSomething()
      Note over A,B: The message to send.\nLine two in the note.
     refnode Over here \nin this part ---\nof sequence diagram
   end   
 else Try again later
       par parallel processing1 
         bob->bob Internal action
          and  
           ||| // Divider comment    
         
            group My own label on an enclosing block        
              bob-->foo External request       
             end           
      
       and
      
         sequential invocation     
         alice->param<<Synchronous return call>> param2     
         opt Testing if true...                     
               foo\\ <--alice Optional response             
               
elseif Checking for something different            
                [[http://www.sequencediagram.org/]] link off                
                 [[$ref:a_note_on_this_part_of_the_sequence_diagram.png Click me! ]]          
                  hgroup rarer alternate path              
                     fuh<-luh Something unusual                  
                    end                 
                   finally Everything must go down                    
                       luh <<--zup Final actions                   
                        autolabel user Automatic Sequence#Labeling                         
                          uce<-[fuu] With some text                                       
                            autonumber                        
                              fuu <- oof Message                          
                                break Jump out                           
                                  autofooter footer incrementer                                    
                                    assert That's working then                                      
                                      space away                                                   
                                       ' There should be empty lines between each step                                                       
                                         remark As simple as :-)                                                                                            
                                           left/right aligned notes can also appear                                                                                                                                                                               within loops or groups                                                                               
                                             Grouped note across three participants                                                                                               
                                              rspace                                                                     
    
' You may customize your config file using skinparams                                                             
  
skinparam backgroundColor {                                                                   
 
} 

@enduml
